headline: Axon Enterprise (AXON) Stock After 21% Year-To-Date Slide And DCF Premium Pricing
summary: Wondering if Axon Enterprise at around US$441.73 is offering value or just reflecting high expectations? This article walks through what that price might imply about the stock today. The stock is down 9.1% over the past week and 21.6% year to date, yet it is up 17.2% over the last month and has gained 118.3% over three years and 181.6% over five years. This combination of returns can change how investors think about both risk and opportunity. Recent coverage has focused on Axon Enterprise as...
